allow: Bash(Get-Command python3, py, node, npx, php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Get-Command python3, py, node, npx, php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(where.exe git 2>$null; where.exe gh 2>$null; where.exe pip 2>$null; where.exe pip3 2>$null; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'python|node|npm' })
